title: stelis llipiensis
intro: Stelis llipiensis is a species of orchid plant, specifically a type of epiphyte native to Central America. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Stelis llipiensis include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, the plant's aerial parts are typically dried and used to make teas or infusions, or it can be combined with other herbs to create remedies for various health conditions.
